mapper.select: SELECT * FROM messages WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT * FROM messages WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = 0 ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT * FROM messages ORDER BY created_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO messages (id, receiver_id, type, title, content, related_id, is_read, created_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{receiverId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{relatedId}, #{isRead}, #{createdTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE messages SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE messages SET is_read = 1 WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId}
